name: Icon Horse
tagline: Fetch the best favicon for a website
description: Retrieve Icon Horse's best available icon or fallback for a fully qualified domain name.

auth.hint: No authentication is required for basic icon retrieval; Pro options require an optional key and are excluded.

tools.name: get_website_icon
tools.description: Return the best available icon or fallback image for a hostname.

params.name: hostname
params.description: Fully qualified domain name such as wikipedia.org.
